Rockchip RK3566 Technical Reference Manual
============================================

1. Product Overview

The RK3566 is a high-performance, low-power quad-core application processor designed for
personal mobile internet devices and AIoT products. It features a quad-core ARM Cortex-A55
processor with a Mali-G52 2EE GPU and a 0.8 TOPS neural processing unit (RKNN NPU).

2. CPU System

- Quad-core ARM Cortex-A55 @ up to 1.8 GHz
- 32KB L1 I-cache and 32KB L1 D-cache per core
- 512KB unified L3 cache
- ARM Neon Advanced SIMD

3. GPU

- ARM Mali-G52 2EE GPU
- OpenGL ES 1.1, 2.0, 3.2
- Vulkan 1.1
- OpenCL 2.0

4. Neural Processing Unit

- RKNN NPU: 0.8 TOPS (INT8)
- Supports TensorFlow, TFLite, Caffe, ONNX, PyTorch, Darknet
- Quantization: INT8/INT16/FP16

5. Video Codec

- H.264 encode up to 1080p @ 60fps
- H.265/HEVC decode up to 4K @ 60fps
- VP9 decode up to 4K @ 30fps
- H.264/H.265/VP9 multi-format decode

6. Camera Interface

- MIPI CSI-2: 1× 4-lane or 2× 2-lane
- Supports up to 8MP camera sensor
- Compatible with OV5647, IMX219, IMX415 sensors

7. Memory Interface

- LPDDR4/LPDDR4X: up to 4 GB
- DDR base address: 0x00000000
- Total RAM: 4096 MB
- eMMC 5.1: up to 256 GB
- Total Flash: 256 GB

8. Peripheral Interfaces

- 5 × I2C controllers
- 4 × SPI (1× SPI slave)
- 10 × UART
- 4 × PWM
- GPIO: up to 128 pins
- 8-channel 10-bit SAR ADC
- 2 × USB2.0 Host
- 1 × USB3.0 OTG (Type-C)
- 1 × PCIe 2.1 (1-lane)
- 2 × SDIO 3.0
- 1 × Gigabit Ethernet (RGMII)

9. Display Interface

- HDMI 2.0a output, up to 4K @ 60Hz
- eDP 1.3: up to 2560×1600 @ 60Hz
- MIPI DSI: 2× 4-lane, up to 2560×1600 @ 60Hz
- RGB/BT.656/BT.1120

10. Audio

- I2S/PCM: 4 groups
- PDM: 8-channel input
- Built-in audio codec
- SPDIF TX/RX

Package: FCBGA 506-ball, 19mm × 19mm
Operating Temperature: -40°C to +85°C (industrial grade available)
Power: PMIC RK809-5 recommended
